files.name: questions.json
files.description: The 80 questionnaire prompts from SQL Text.

files.name: speakers.json
files.description: Anonymous speaker records and available metadata.

files.name: recordings.json
files.description: One row per available recording, with placeholder Google Drive fields.

files.name: annotations.json
files.description: One row per output.json annotation record.

files.name: variants.json
files.description: Per-question target words and possible variant options extracted from the legacy admin page.

files.name: facets.json
files.description: Precomputed filter choices and counts for the browser UI.

files.name: audit.json
files.description: Export counts, metadata completeness, and coverage gaps.

privacyNotes: Phone numbers and raw speaker tokens are not exported.
legacyUserId is retained only as a stable trace key to the old SQL database.
audio.legacyPath reflects the old local relative path; audio.googleDriveFileId and audio.url are placeholders for the future Drive migration.
